chunks.title: Promise of Healing and Restoration
chunks.reason: A unified oracle where God promises healing, restoration of fortunes, and cleansing from iniquity to the city of Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Restoration of Joy and Agriculture
chunks.reason: A prophetic vision describing the return of joy, marriage, thank offerings, and agricultural life to the desolate land.

chunks.title: The Righteous Branch and Eternal Covenant
chunks.reason: A declaration of the coming Davidic King who will bring justice and the assurance that his line and the priesthood will never end.

chunks.title: Covenant Analogy with Day and Night
chunks.reason: An argument using the constancy of day and night to prove the certainty of God's covenant with David and the Levites.

chunks.title: Rebuttal to Doubt and Final Promise
chunks.reason: A concluding speech addressing the people's doubt about God rejecting his chosen families, reaffirming the covenant with Jacob.
